text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The Arima Kinen... It has come at last,<n>Trainer—our
first major clash with the<n>generation of
yesteryear.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I've had several opportunities to<n>challenge them
before.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
However, only a stage of this<n>magnitude will
suffice for my opening<n>ceremony.
choice_data_list: They won't be holding back, either.
They won't be holding back, either.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. Both Special Week and Grass<n>Wonder
have come, thus fulfilling<n>their promises.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Their grit has earned my respect. I,<n>though, shall
be victorious!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Today's the big day, Opera O!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Please, pay me no mind. I myself will<n>be heeding
no distractions.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Heh, hehehe! Snort! That posture...That extreme focus...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
That is your essence, through and<n>through. You
two are worth<n>surpassing—twin peaks of the older
generation, Grass and Spe.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: T.M. Opera O turns to the fans.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hear me, spectators whose hearts<n>beat with
adoration for Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Today, I stand on the track of the<n>Arima Kinen for
the first time.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
It is the past versus the present. Here<n>I am, to ring
the opening bell...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And to serenade the architects of a<n>golden age
with respect—and<n>foreboding doom!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Once the gates open, the sun shall<n>sink into the
horizon, plunging<n>Nakayama Racecourse into a
prolonged night.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The battle shall unfold in the deepest<n>darkness,
growing ever darker even<n>as dawn approaches.
However...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
No matter how horrific the ensuing<n>strife becomes,
not a soul shall<n>sleep... until this score is settled
once<n>and for all.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But in the end, I shall arise the victor,<n>bringing with
me a new, shining<n>dawn!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Witness it with your own eyes, you<n>spectators!
The dawn of a new age!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now, set forth, we leaders of our<n>times! Onto the
arena of this singular<n>encounter!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: All right!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Gladly.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The fire Opera O has lit burns in the<n>eyes of her
two competitors.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She's taking the leap from being the<n>Overlord of
her generation to the<n>Centurial Overlord of all
generations...<n>Her true battle is about to begin!
